title: Arknights origins originium arts
description: Add the originium arts in the game Arknights into the game based on the mod Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks
body:
This mod adds the originium arts from the game Arknights into minecraft base on the origins mod and Iron's spells 'n spellbooks. So you can have different magic pairing from different originium arts to improve the game expereince. Here are the arts added into game according to the Iron's spells 'n spellbooks:
- Novice
- Holy
- Lightning
- Blaze
- Ender
- Evocation
- Crimson
- Frost
- Nature
 
If there are any issues about the mod or any bugs, please tell me.
